RED_PAINT_ORB.title: Red Paint Orb
RED_PAINT_ORB.description: Orb: Increases attack and bursts for AoE damage.
RED_PAINT_ORB.smartDescription: [gold]Passive:[/gold] At end of turn, gain [blue]{Passive}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].\n[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Deal [blue]{Evoke}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
BLUE_PAINT_ORB.title: Blue Paint Orb
BLUE_PAINT_ORB.description: Orb: Grants Block to self and team.
BLUE_PAINT_ORB.smartDescription: [gold]Passive:[/gold] At end of turn, gain [blue]{Passive}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].\n[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Give [blue]{Evoke}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] to all allies.
YELLOW_PAINT_ORB.title: Yellow Paint Orb
YELLOW_PAINT_ORB.description: Orb: Generates Energy for self and allies.
YELLOW_PAINT_ORB.smartDescription: [gold]Passive:[/gold] At start of turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.\n[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Give {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} to all allies.
MANOSABA_ORB.title: Manosaba Orb
MANOSABA_ORB.description: Orb: Uses custom icon/scene paths from the mod.
MANOSABA_ORB.smartDescription: [gold]Passive:[/gold] At end of turn, gain [blue]{Passive}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].\n[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Deal [blue]{Evoke}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
